titleStmt.title: SII 34.296: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 296. Tiruvaranguḷam, Alangudi Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the north wall of the old kitchen in the first prākāra in the Haratīrthēśvara temple.

summary.p: Records the assignment of the pāḍikāval dues by the ūrār of some three villages, namely Irumbāḻi, Marudāntanilai, and Vaḍa-Mayilāppūr, to the temple of Tiruvaraṅguḷam-uḍaiya-Nāyaṉār in appreciation of the protection they got from the nāṭṭār of Valla-nāḍu in Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu. The three villages are said to belong a geographical unit called Irumbāḻi-añjunilai.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
vibhava varuṣam puraṭṭāti mātam 1 tiyati Irācarāca vaḷaṉāṭṭu valla nāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruvarankuḷamuṭaiya nāyiṉārkku Irumpāḻi Añcu nilaikku
Irumpāḻi Ūravarum marutānta nilai Ūravarum vaṭamayilāppūr Ūravarumōm pāṭikāval cuvantaram paṇṇik koṭutta paricāvatu Eṅkaḷukku
(ḷukku) Iṉṉāḷ mutal cantirātitavaraikku vallanāṭṭu nāṭṭavarāl Orupollāppaṟa kāttu nōkki pōtakkaṭavatākavum nōkkippōtu
miṭattu Āṇṭu Oṉṟukku nāṟpatiṅkala nellu nāyiṉār paṇṭārattāṟ kēṟa Oru mutalākac celavaṟuttup pōtak kaṭavōmākavum Ippaṭik
ku cantirātitavarai paṟṟi Aṉupavittup pōtakkaṭavatākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu cukantaram paṇṇikkuṭuttōm Uṭaiyār tiruvaraṅ
kuḷamuṭaiya nāyiṉāṟku Irumpāḻi Ūravarum marutāntaṉilai Ūravarum vaṭamayilāppūravarum Ippaṭikku Ūravar coṟpaṭikku
Digital edition of SII 34.296 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
